MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-12-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT DIEGO RODRIGUEZ' MOTION SETTING ASIDE AND VACATING DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGEMENT; GRANTING DEFENDANT LEAVE TO DEFEND IS GRANTED, FOR GOOD CAUSE SHOWN, AND DEFENDANT IS GIVEN LEAVE TO FILE THE PLEADING ATTACHED AS EXHIBIT B TO THE MOVING PAPERS. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. THE REQUEST FOR RETURN OF MONIES OBTAINED BY PLAINTIFF THROUGH POST JUDGMENT EXECUTION IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT HAS NOT PROVIDED ANY INFORMATION AS TO THE WAGE GARNISHMENT OR OTHER STEPS TAKEN TO EXECUTE THE JUDGMENT, OR ANY PROOF AS TO HOW MUCH MONEY WAS TAKEN. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Motion To Setting Aside And Vacating Default And Default Judgement; Granting Deft Leave To Defend
Off Calendar Jun-12-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: ALLEN J. KENT, ESQ., 415.272.2662, FOR DEFENDANT DIEGO RODRIGUEZ; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT DIEGO RODRIGUEZ' Motion Setting Aside And Vacating Default And Default Judgement; Granting Defendant Leave To Defend is granted, for good cause shown, and Defendant is given leave to file the pleading attached as Exhibit B to the moving papers. No opposition was filed. The request for return of monies obtained by plaintiff through post judgment execution is denied without prejudice. Defendant has not provided any information as to the wage garnishment or other steps taken to execute the judgment, or any proof as to how much money was taken. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
